reach_why: Touches broad questions about learning, temporality, update structure, and stability, but relies on private undefined terms.
novelty_why: Reframes continual learning as interval-dependent self-preservation, though core ideas echo known stability-plasticity tradeoff discussions.
falsifiable_why: Claims hinge on undefined constructs, making empirical tests unclear beyond general batch-versus-streaming performance comparisons.
explanation: Learning may depend on structured pauses and resistance, not continuous exposure, with time framed as intervals between updates.
